title: The Mookers, the Floofers, and the Solar Mookball
summary: On the Planet of the Mookers, a group of moose-like creatures loses their favorite mookball when it is accidentally thrown all the way to the Sun. Their incredibly bouncy neighbors, the Floofers, leap across the solar system—visiting Mars and the Moon—to retrieve the lost toy. After the ball is safely recovered, the two groups spend a joyful day playing games of floofcatch and mookball together before the Floofers return to their home in the clouds and the exhausted Mookers settle in for a long sleep.

highlightQuote.text: They're moose. And they mook! Mook mook mook mook mook. I'll be the Floofers, you'll be the Mookers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, well the doctor's office is closed during the day, but the hospital is open at night... people stay there. All right.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Unless the doctor's closed in the day.

Well the doctor's office is closed at night because people have appointments there during the day, but they don't go there usually at night. All right, it's time for Stars and Stories. I've got the stars set up. There we go, turn out the light please. Okay, what are we going to do a Stars and Stories about tonight?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: The Mookers and the Floofers.
The Mookers and the Floofers. Now can you just remind me who the Mookers are again? They live on the Planet of the Mookers. Are they... are they moose or something else?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: They're moose. And they mook! Mook mook mook mook mook. I'll be the Floofers, you'll be the Mookers.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Well, once upon a time, it was a calm quiet morning on the Planet of the Mookers.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Until ding-dong!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Maggy the Mooker went "Moooook, who is it?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Floofy the Floofer and all the other Floofer friends!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Are you coming over to visit us?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes, we are.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Maggy the Mooker said, "Well welcome, Floofy the Floofer. Come on over."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And our names are Floofty, and Floofero, and Floofo.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Floofty and Floofero. Well, I'm glad you're here because we Mookers were playing with our mookball, which is a ball that we play a ball game with where we bounce it around and throw it to each other and play catch and try to keep it from falling on the ground. And you know what happened?
What?
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: My friend Mogarana, she threw it so high up that it got stuck up high somewhere, we don't even know where it is.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Move back on Mars! I'll check on every planet, says the Floofer because we can bounce really high. Boing! And she jumped really high up onto Mars then the Moon, then the Sun, and every other planet and then she said, "Here, it was on the Sun!"
You found our mookball on the Sun? Huh, thanks! It must have gotten really hot on the Sun, didn't it melt? Because the Sun is really hot.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Um, no.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, well that's good. Well thanks for getting it for us, Floofers. That was really nice of you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The Floofer say "Now, now I, so we bought our floofball so we're going to play floofcatch. Do you want to play with us?"

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Yes!" and the Mookers... and then she threw it up to the stars and then Floofers and then Mookers tried to catch it like this: hold your hands out. And Maggy the Mooker said, "Catch! Whoops! Bonk!" and it fell down. Let me try again. Can you throw it to me again please?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Throw!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Floof!" Oh, this floofball is so soft, I have to catch it a little differently than I catch the mookball, but I caught it that time, thanks! And I'll throw it back: Floof!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then this time you throw it to me because I know how to hold my hand.
Okay, here comes the floofball. Floof!
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: And got it! Thanks. Now let's play mookball.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, I'll boing the mookball right to you, watch out, it goes fast. Boing!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Boing! Boing! Boing! Boing! Boing! Boing! Boing!
And they played mookball all day and then everyone was tired.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Our Floofer say, "We're going to go home, boing!" and they all boing back onto Earth.
Oh!
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: No, the Floofer Cloud!

Oh yes, they live on the Floofer Cloud, that's where they went boinging back to. And the Mookers said, "Wow, that was a nice visit from the Floofers and they helped us find our lost mookball which was all the way on the Sun! It's a good thing those Floofers can bounce so high." And then the Mookers were all tired out from their big day of playing with the Floofers, and so they decided to mook their way right into bed and mook right to sleep. And that's the end of Stars and Stories.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Daddy, you left some of these people downstairs...
transcript.speaker: Izzy

characters.name: Maggy the Mooker
characters.description: A moose-like creature who lives on the Planet of the Mookers.

characters.name: Floofy the Floofer
characters.description: A bouncy creature who visits the Mookers.

characters.name: Mogarana
characters.description: A Mooker who accidentally threw a ball onto the Sun.

characters.name: The Mookers
characters.description: Hailing from a neighboring planet, these toe-sized spheres of dense fur bear the uncanny features of miniature moose. They communicate through a rhythmic chorus of "mooks" and are defined by a singular, voracious obsession with sandwiches.

characters.name: The Floofers
characters.description: Tiny, pom-pom-like, and irrepressibly bouncy, these magical ball-shaped denizens of the Floofer Clouds leap with wide-eyed grace across resilient, vaporous peaks. Sustained by a vital dependency on floof-berries, these restless creatures possess a staggering verticality and a vibrant energy so potent that falling asleep remains an elusive feat.

places.name: Planet of the Mookers
places.description: An enigmatic alien world defined by its fuzzy yet curiously slimy surface, this planet serves as the ancestral cradle of the Mookers and the site of Chicky’s destined path. Strewn with the colossal remains of giant fossils, the realm was recently scouted by Seeker and Buddy and documented in the Seeker’s potion closet; it remains accessible only to those who imbibe a specific purple alchemical elixir.

places.name: Mars
places.description: Serving as the home of Julian and the primary destination for the Floofers’ quest for the mookball, this primordial red world hosts the Red Bolt landing site. Defined by the rhythmic thunder of giant volcanoes and the jagged edges of ancient impact craters, the ash-shrouded landscape rests under a hazy pink sky in a haunting silence—a world devoid of other human life where only the fire and dust endure.

places.name: The Moon
places.description: Visible from Earth as a pockmarked sphere of gray, white, and black, this low-gravity waypoint for sun-bound crews is a playground of ancient space rocks and leaping Floofers; its silver dust now serves as a silent sanctuary for a misplaced book and the long-lost mother cat.

places.name: The Sun
places.description: A massive, fiery star at the solar system's heart, a realm of incinerating heat that serves as the final, scorching sanctuary where the lost mookball is eventually found.

places.name: Earth
places.description: The ancestral cradle of humanity and the definitive anchor for the galactic mission, this rocky world pulses with a hidden molten core. As the home planet where the journey begins and ends, it serves as the foundational site for the Floofers’ true home and new school, bridging an ancient legacy with the education of a new generation.

places.name: Floofer Cloud
places.description: A distant and storied realm, this ancestral cradle serves as the Floofers' original sanctuary—a soft, fluffy, and sparkly world of profound comfort. Draped in the downy materials from which their gentle lineage first emerged, it remains a shimmering environment where they live and play.
